allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const Anthropic = require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); const client = new Anthropic\({apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}\); client.messages.create\({model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5', max_tokens: 10, messages: [{role: 'user', content: 'hi'}]}\).then\(r => console.log\('SUCCESS'\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('ERROR', e.status, e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const Anthropic = require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); console.log\('key:', process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY?.slice\(0,20\)\); const client = new Anthropic\(\); client.messages.create\({model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5', max_tokens: 10, messages: [{role: 'user', content: 'hi'}]}\).then\(r => console.log\('SUCCESS'\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('FAIL', e.status, e.message\)\)")
